testcase.name: test_signup_creates_user
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:112: in test_signup_creates_user assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_a9e014bb@hireflow.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_upload_pdf_and_lifecycle
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:246: in test_upload_pdf_and_lifecycle assert b.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
